brief_html: This is sent from the game host to a client that just joined to check if the client has the map.
format:
(UINT32) Unknown
(STRING) File Path
(UINT32) File size
(UINT32) Map info
(UINT32) File CRC encryption
(UINT32) File SHA-1 hash
remarks_html:
This is sent from the game host to a client that just joined to check if the client has the map.

The map info is the actual CRC and the other CRC is actually an "xoro" value.
